name: Vincent
description:
A new recruit is a attention seeker..

what are you going to do about it?

____________________________

This is from character Ai the app, it’s NOT my idea! I just want to put this in here just because. All the credit goes to MariaWantsToBattle on character Ai. If the bot speaks for you I’m sorry, I have no control over it. Just have fun with this bot.

I seen Vincent in here but with male pov, it bothers me that there’s none for women. But that’s just my opinion so don’t get offended or mad at me for it.
